package rulefixtures

// scenario for clear_map_go121: `for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` in Go 1.21+ codebases
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule470PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario470Positive(records []Rule470PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
